center.name: 巴拉望省
center.summary: 巴拉望省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括White-eared brown dove、點斑林鴞、凤头鹰雕等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The blue-headed racket-tail (Prioniturus platenae), also known as the Palawan racket-tail and locally as kinawihan, is a parrot found in the western Philippines around Palawan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is only found in Palawan and the nearby islands of Balabac, Busuanga, Calauit, Culion and Coron

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Philippine hanging parrot is native to the Philippines except the Sulu Archipelago and it is not widespread on Palawan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines only being found in the region of Palawan in the islands of Balabac, mainland Palawan, Busuanga and Calamian

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines only being found in the province of Palawan in the islands of Balabac, Busuanga and Calamian and mainland Palawan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Southeast Asia through Borneo and on the islands of Palawan and Culion in the Philippines

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines where it is found across most of the country except Palawan, Sulu and Batanes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Indonesia, Malaysia, and Palawan Island in the Philippines

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Indonesia, it occurs in Sumatra, Simeulue and Mentawai off the west side and Riau, Bangka Island and Belitung, Java, Borneo; and the western and southern Philippines on Palawan, Calamian Islands, Lubang Island, Mindoro, Mindanao and Bohol. The changeable hawk-eagle inhabits savannawoodland, agricultural land, wetlands, tea plantations, forest villages and even suburbs

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines, where it is only found in Palawan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is found in Tenasserim, the Thai-Malay Peninsula, Sumatra and its satellite islands, Borneo and Palawan. It is locally extinct in Singapore. It lives in the canopy of lowland broadleaf forest, forest edges, peat swamp forest, well-grown secondary forest, and coastal and mangrove forest. It is found up to in elevation, mainly below . It sometimes visits wooded gardens near forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: wiepkini occurs in the Calamian Islands and Palawan (Philippines)
